changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-lsp/src/supervisor.rs, swissarmyhammer-lsp/src/daemon.rs

Both LspSupervisorManager and LspDaemon are public types without Debug implementations. Child and watch::Sender may not be Debug, but manual impls showing the command name and current state would be valuable for diagnostics.

Per Rust review guidelines: 'Debug implemented for all public types with non-empty representation.'
[WARNING] LspSupervisorManager and LspDaemon missing Debug impls
